page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance belonging to the ecs.r7t server family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 64 physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated physical execution resources without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent compute performance.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, managed via a KVM hypervisor.

This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation and high memory capacity. Suitable applications include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-bound data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, the instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture with a single thread per core configuration. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio suitable for memory-bound applications. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor. This configuration is optimized for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and enterprise applications requiring consistent, non-shared CPU performance and substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated physical cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for efficient data transfer
